title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
